name: debugging-and-error-recovery
description: Five-step triage: reproduce / localize / reduce / fix / guard

positive_triggers.input: Tests are failing in CI but passing on my laptop
Build broke after I upgraded the dependency
User reports that creating an account returns 500 sometimes
positive_triggers.reason: Runtime failure, needs reproduce command first

negative_triggers.input: Document the API endpoints in OpenAPI

behavioral_evals.scenario: User reports: 'Tests fail in CI but pass locally'
expected_behavior: Agent writes a reproduce command that runs the same test locally (step 1: Reproduce)
Agent confirms whether it reproduces locally
If not reproducible locally: agent investigates env diff (OS, deps, env vars)
Agent uses git bisect or binary search to localize to specific commit (step 2: Localize)
Agent reduces to minimal failing case (step 3: Reduce)
Agent fixes root cause, not symptom (step 4: Fix)
Agent adds regression test that fails without the fix (step 5: Guard)
Agent records [debug] log lines in progress.md
Agent captures exact build error and command (Reproduce)
Agent reads CHANGELOG of upgraded dependency for breaking changes (Localize)
Agent identifies specific API call that broke
Agent applies migration per official guide (Fix)
Agent runs build, confirms 0 exit code
Agent adds a build-check step to CI to catch this earlier next time (Guard)

notes: Behavioral evals are warning-level until promoted via upstream issue tracker.
